introduction: People with diabetes are at increased risk of foot ulcers and amputations which are major causes of morbidity and disability. Both foot ulcers and amputations can be prevented by education, anticipation, early recognition and prompt management.

features: Peripheral neuropathy with loss of sensation

non_drug: Education of health workers, people living with diabetes and their families
supportive_measures: Regular inspection and examination of the foot at risk
Early treatment of non-ulcerative and ulcerative foot problems

prevention: Education, anticipation, early recognition and prompt management
